content:
✨ maildrop | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a simple, self-hostable email service for managing disposable or custom email addresses for various online activities.
✨ Key Features: • Random email generation • Use custom emails • Password protected inboxes • Clean UI • Easy setup
📖 Summary: Maildrop is a self-hostable email service that allows users to receive emails on any address within their domain. It's designed for managing multiple email addresses easily, signing up for services without using a primary email, and creating multiple website accounts.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
